value.found_quote: Single sign-on is available for Team plans, Enterprise plans, and Console organizations. This guide covers the steps to configure SSO for Team and Enterprise plans, and Claude Console organizations.
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that SSO is available for Team plans and Enterprise plans (matching the claim), and provides a detailed step-by-step configuration guide for setting up SSO with enterprise Identity Providers (e.g., Okta, Entra ID/Azure AD, Google SAML, OneLogin, JumpCloud, Duo) for centralized authentication. The page is an active support/how-to article with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
